answer_en: Ordinary taxation (imposition ordinaire) means that your taxes are calculated based on a full tax declaration of your income and assets, rather than being deducted at source. In Canton Vaud, holders of a C permit are subject to this regime and must file a complete return annually [Vaud 2025 Instructions p.5].

citations.source_title: Instructions générales sur la déclaration d'impôt 2025 (Canton de Vaud)
